title: From Street to Paradise - Direct Path to Dignity

current_reality.situation: Homeless, living on street/shelter/car, no stable housing
current_reality.daily_life: Find food, find safe place to sleep, survive, avoid police, repeat
current_reality.actual_situation: Bottom of extraction system - nowhere lower to fall
current_reality.how_you_got_here: Job loss, addiction, mental health, medical bankruptcy, family breakdown, veteran with PTSD, released from prison - or just bad luck
current_reality.soul_cost: Dehumanized, invisible, treated as garbage, want to die but keep surviving
current_reality.future: Die on street within 5-10 years, freeze in winter or heat stroke in summer, forgotten

immediate: Where to sleep tonight - shelters full, street dangerous
Where to get food - soup kitchens, dumpsters, panhandling
Police harassment - 'move along', can't exist anywhere
Violence - robbed, beaten, raped, killed (homeless murder rate 20x average)
Weather - freeze in winter, bake in summer, no protection
Health deteriorating - no care, conditions worsening, dying slowly
deeper: Invisible - people look through you, dehumanized
No agency - can't get job (no address), can't get housing (no job), trapped in loop
Addiction/mental health - maybe cause, maybe effect, but no treatment
No escape - every path out blocked (need address for job, need job for housing, etc.)
Survival mode - can't plan future, just survive today
Want to die - but keep surviving somehow
existential: Potential wasted - maybe were engineer, veteran, parent, now... this
Die on street unmourned - another statistic
Legacy: Homeless person #47,293 - forgotten before dead
System's verdict: Disposable, worthless, better off dead

immediate_provisions.shelter: BARRACKS - same night, safe bed, your own locker. Azure/TRUTH screening keeps high-risk behaviors in high-support quarters until stabilized, while Crimson/TASTE lets you pick mentors, quiet zones, and work crews through Sorting Hat lobbies defined in foundations/BARRACKS sorting dual-layer.md and coordinated via the 23 COMMAND duty bands.
immediate_provisions.food: TRUTH food - reliable, hot, no waiting in charity lines
immediate_provisions.healthcare: Immediate medical care - treat infections, injuries, chronic conditions
immediate_provisions.safety: Protected - no more violence, no more police harassment, SAFE
immediate_provisions.dignity: Treated as HUMAN - not garbage, not problem, PERSON

no_requirements.no_job_history: Don't care - can you contribute ANYTHING? Yes? Welcome.
no_requirements.no_background_check: Past is past - can you work toward future? Yes? Welcome.
no_requirements.no_sobriety_required: Initially - but no substances in BARRACKS, will detox, supported through it
no_requirements.no_mental_health_clearance: Treatment available - work with your condition, heal as you go

start_where_you_are: Day 1-7: Recover - eat, sleep, get healthy, no work required initially
Week 2-4: Light tasks - cleaning, organizing, whatever you can manage
Month 2+: Real work - as health/mental state improves, contribution increases
You work to YOUR capability - not some arbitrary standard
roles_possible: Start with: Cleaning, organizing, light assistance
Build to: Food prep, childcare support, facility maintenance
Eventually: Whatever skills you had before homelessness - use them again
If former tradesperson: Skills still there, apply them
If former professional: Intelligence still there, use it
the_work.philosophy: Everyone has value - find what YOU can contribute, do that, valued for it

tokens_of_appreciation.value: $2-4 million/year even for limited contribution (2 years)
tokens_of_appreciation.meaning: Human being HAS value - you're not garbage, you're CONTRIBUTOR, compensated as such

you_transformed: From homeless to housed PERMANENTLY - $2M+/year buys any housing
From hungry to fed FOREVER - can afford any food
From sick to healthy - can afford any healthcare
From invisible to ESSENTIAL - you built paradise, you mattered
options: Housing - buy home, apartment, whatever you want
Healthcare - ongoing treatment, whatever you need
Reconnect - find lost family with resources to help them
Help others - fund homeless services with $2M+/year income
Work - if want, next quest available, or retire
LIVE - finally, actually live, not just survive

why_this_appeals.immediate_safety: Tonight: SAFE, SHELTERED, FED - not 'maybe', GUARANTEED
why_this_appeals.dignity_restored: Treated as human being with value - not garbage
why_this_appeals.path_from_bottom: Direct route from street to wealth - 2 years only
why_this_appeals.no_bureaucracy: No forms, no waiting lists, no 'prove you deserve help' - just show up
why_this_appeals.purpose: Life has meaning again - contributing to sacred mission
why_this_appeals.health: Treatment for whatever broke you - addiction, mental health, physical issues
why_this_appeals.community: Not alone - 100M others, many came from similar places, understand
why_this_appeals.redemption: From bottom to builder of paradise - ultimate comeback story

addressing_concerns.addiction: No substances in BARRACKS - forced detox, but SUPPORTED - healthcare, community, purpose helps healing
addressing_concerns.mental_health: Treatment available, work adapted to condition, healing through purpose proven effective
addressing_concerns.too_broken: If you're alive, you're not too broken - start with light work, build up capability
addressing_concerns.criminal_record: Past is past - contribute to future, that's what matters
addressing_concerns.no_skills: You survived homelessness - that's skill - adaptability, resilience, you'll learn rest
addressing_concerns.physical_disability: Work to capability - even minimal contribution gets tokens, you're valued

relation_to_death_fighting.youve_faced_death: Homeless face death daily - you know death is enemy
relation_to_death_fighting.street_kills: Die on street = system killed you - BARRACKS offers life
relation_to_death_fighting.after_survival: Survived street, now help ensure no one hungry, no animal slaughtered, no human dies before time
relation_to_death_fighting.meaning: From nearly dead to building life for all - ultimate reversal

the_direct_pitch.tomorrow: What will you eat tomorrow? Dumpster? Soup kitchen? BARRACKS offers three meals, good food, FREE.
the_direct_pitch.next_week: Where will you be? Still on street? BARRACKS offers PURPOSE, community, path from bottom to wealth.
the_direct_pitch.2_years_from_now: On street, probably dead? Or BARRACKS, mission complete, tokens making you WEALTHY?
the_direct_pitch.choice_is_simple: Die on street OR build paradise and become millionaire - you decide

the_call.invitation: Come as you are - homeless today, builder tomorrow, wealthy in 2 years
